detail.description:
■ Endless joy of dragon collection and breeding
A breeding system beyond imagination: Combine dragons to discover mysterious rare dragons born only from your unique choices.
Cuteness overload! Pixel dragon collection: Collect a vast array of dragons crafted with intricate retro pixel art and complete your very own dragon encyclopedia.
An infinitely expanding lineup: Thousands of dragons added through regular updates will fuel your collector's passion.
